description: Peptide/centroided feature detection on peak-picked LC-MS data using FeatureFinderAlgorithmPicked (the modern replacement for the removed FeatureFinderCentroided). Writes a featureXML and a CSV table.
rules: writes features.featureXML and features.csv under record_store
tunable via MZ_TOL_PPM, CHARGE_LOW, CHARGE_HIGH, MIN_SPECTRA
usage: Set INPUT (centroided mzML). Optional MZ_TOL_PPM/CHARGE_LOW/CHARGE_HIGH/MIN_SPECTRA. Output: features.featureXML (+ features.csv).
limitation: Requires pyOpenMS 3.5.0 (Python 3.9+) to produce real content; if absent the porter still creates features.featureXML and records the reason.
